hero.tagline: For Ecommerce Brands, Founders, and Agencies
hero.headline: Stop Guessing. Build an Ecommerce Growth System That Actually Scales.
hero.description: I help ecommerce brands and agency teams fix the three leaks killing growth: weak storefront conversion, unreliable tracking, and ad campaigns that burn budget. You get a conversion-focused store, clean attribution, and paid ads built around profitable decisions.

services-overview.heading: Everything You Need to Turn Traffic Into Revenue

cards.title: Store Design & Development
bullets: Shopify and WooCommerce builds designed to convert, not just look clean
High-performing landing pages with GemPages and Replo
Product page UX improvements that reduce drop-off
Mobile-first layouts that make checkout frictionless

cards.title: Paid Advertising
bullets: Meta and Google campaign setup based on your margin reality
Creative testing and audience iteration built for steady scale
Retargeting flows that recover lost buyers
Budget allocation focused on profitable growth, not vanity metrics

cards.title: Tracking & Analytics
bullets: Meta Pixel + CAPI implementation that improves signal quality
GA4 and event mapping tailored to your funnel
Attribution cleanup so reporting matches business reality
Dashboards that show where revenue is really coming from

featured-case-studies.heading: Real Projects. Measurable Outcomes.
featured-case-studies.intro: You do not need another freelancer who says "we will optimize." You need someone who ships, measures, and improves with clear numbers. Here are a few recent wins.

cards.challenge: Paid traffic was growing, but conversion rate stayed flat and ROAS kept dropping.
cards.solution: Redesigned key storefront pages, rebuilt product page hierarchy, and restructured Meta campaigns around contribution margin.

cards.challenge: Agency needed fast Shopify builds and reliable tracking without hiring full-time specialists.
cards.solution: Provided white-label store development plus CAPI/GA4 implementation across client accounts with standardized QA.

cards.challenge: Strong offline sales but weak online channel with unclear attribution and underperforming ad spend.
cards.solution: Built a conversion-first WooCommerce store, launched paid search + social campaigns, and implemented clean event tracking.

testimonials-carousel.heading: What Clients Say After Working Together

testimonials.quote: We had traffic, but our store was leaking conversions everywhere. Shourov fixed the structure, simplified checkout flow, and our paid traffic started converting like it should.
He did not just run ads. He fixed the tracking first, showed us what was broken, then rebuilt campaigns with real data. The difference was immediate.
We use Shourov as a white-label partner for Shopify and analytics work. Delivery is fast, clean, and reliable. Our clients stay because quality stays high.
As a solo founder, I needed someone who could explain things clearly and execute without babysitting. That is exactly what I got.
Our reports finally make sense. Meta, GA4, and backend numbers now align closely enough to make confident scaling decisions.
The best part was how practical the process felt. No fluff, no random tactics, just focused work tied to revenue outcomes.

items.question: What are your pricing ranges?
items.answer: Most projects start from $800 for focused implementation work and can go up to $12,000 for full store + tracking + ads builds. Ongoing retainers typically range from $1,500 to $8,000 per month depending on scope, ad spend, and reporting needs.

items.question: How long does a typical project take?
items.answer: Smaller tracking or landing page projects are usually completed in 1 to 3 weeks. Full system builds typically take 4 to 8 weeks, including audit, implementation, QA, and performance refinement.

items.question: Do you work with agencies?
items.answer: Yes. I partner with agencies as a white-label ecommerce and tracking specialist. You can keep client-facing ownership while I handle delivery behind the scenes with clear communication and consistent quality.

final-cta.heading: Ready to Stop Wasting Ad Spend?
final-cta.subheading: Book a strategy call and get a clear plan to improve conversion, clean up tracking, and scale with confidence.
final-cta.trustReinforcement: Join growth-focused ecommerce brands and agencies that trust me to build and optimize their revenue engine.

socialProofSnippet.text: "No fluff. Clear strategy, clean implementation, measurable results."

brandAndLegal.tagline: Profitable ecommerce systems for brands that refuse to waste ad spend.
